localizations.title: The Formula
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Have you searched the lab coat?
localizations.hiddenObject_2: In the corner of the engine room...
localizations.code_8652: An electrical buzzing noise can be heard.
localizations.hint_3_first: You can make simple words with the elements. Then you just need to choose the right line.
localizations.hint_7: I'd swear it's a microscope slide.
localizations.hint_8: You probably need the key that's in the box with a hole in it.
localizations.hint_11: If only you could see the professor's fingerprints.
localizations.hint_13: How fortunate, you have a projector.
localizations.hint_19: To get out, it's essential to have the formula. There must be 4 numbers on it.
localizations.hint_23: You can listen to it on a record player.
localizations.hint_25: It must be the secret entrance to the laboratory, but you need to find out how the "door" opens.
localizations.hint_27: You need to raise the cork. Perhaps with water?
localizations.hint_28: It's a stencil picture of the Mona Lisa! Or rather Mo Na Li Sa.
localizations.hint_31: It's time to enter the lab.
localizations.hint_33: It's the key of a drawer.
localizations.hint_37: You need to restore the dial tone. You must be able to do it in the machine room.
localizations.hint_42: Have you looked in the pockets?
localizations.hint_43: You can read it backwards. You need to find a way to read it in the other way. Another code?
localizations.hint_47: There must be a key somewhere. Have you searched the lab coat?
localizations.hint_50: That would be useful on an electrical panel
localizations.hint_57: The flowers won't be of any use, but the water in the vase on the other hand...
localizations.hint_59: It's the telephone! Answer it quickly!
localizations.hint_64: 2=A/B/C and so on. The code must be 4 letter word.
localizations.hint_73: The colors remind you of the rows on the electrical panel. You must need to link certain pins with the wire.
localizations.hint_80: This lamp would be useful for finding fingerprints.
localizations.hint_84: You must be able to open the door to the machine room.
localizations.hint_85: There are exactly 9 files. What do the initials mean? The one missing must designate a card.
localizations.hint_90: Count ALL vials in each color to obtain a number sequence for the formula.
localizations.hint_91: There must be a logical order. What is the meaning of these ">"?
localizations.hint_92: In the corner of the engine room...
localizations.hint_93: Count ALL vials in each color to obtain a number sequence for the formula.
localizations.hint_123: You need to turn on the generator before anything else.
localizations.hint_136: The control panel must work now.
localizations.hint_157: Perhaps the stencil drawing on the filing cabinet is useful. It's the Mona Lisa! Or rather Mo Na Li Sa...
localizations.hint_164: Turn on the generator then do the addition following the doctor's instructions.
localizations.hint_166: You need to put the wire in the correct position. One pin per row.
localizations.hint_199_first: These colored numbers must be those of the exit code. You need to put them in order.
localizations.hint_199: Count ALL vials in each color to obtain a number sequence for the formula.
